summary: Comprehensive mobile UX bug testing for 11 reported issues. All bugs verified as fixed through UI testing at 390px viewport and code review.

Bug_A_EVFI_Response.details: EVFI diagnosis text wraps properly at 390px. No horizontal page overflow detected (bodyScrollWidth=390, windowWidth=390). Checked 156 text elements - only minor 'Close' button icon overflow (40px).

Bug_B_Dashboard_Tabs.details: Dashboard tabs have overflow-x-auto, flex layout. All 4 tabs (Workshop Overview, Service Tickets, Receivables Overview, Leaderboard) have flex-shrink-0 and whitespace-nowrap for proper horizontal scrolling.

Bug_C_Inventory_Tabs.details: Items page tabs have 'h-9 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-muted p-1 text-muted-foreground w-full overflow-x-auto flex whitespace-nowrap' classes for horizontal scrolling.

Bug_D_Sidebar_Text.details: Sidebar nav text uses text-bw-white/[0.65] (not 0.45) for better readability. Section icons correctly use text-bw-white/45. Verified in Layout.jsx lines 275, 296, 335.

Bug_E_Single_Close_Button.details: Mobile sidebar (Sheet component) has exactly ONE close button. Count verified: 1. Duplicate X from SidebarContent was removed.

Bug_F_Invoice_Date.details: Invoice date field shows full date '03/11/2026' (not truncated). Date input has min-width: 140px. Form grid uses 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-3 gap-4' for responsive layout.

Bug_G_Item_Dropdown_Empty.details: Code verified: Empty state shows 'No items yet' + '+ Add your first item' link (lines 1480, 1485). Placeholder is 'Search items...' (line 1476). Demo org has items so empty state didn't trigger in UI.

Bug_H_Customer_Dropdown_Empty.details: Code verified: Empty state shows 'No customers yet' + '+ Add new customer' link (lines 1437, 1442). Placeholder is 'Search customers...' (line 1433). Demo org has customers so empty state didn't trigger in UI.

Bug_I_Vehicle_Categories.details: Vehicle category dropdown shows all options: Electric Scooter (2W), Electric Motorcycle (2W), Electric Auto (3W), Electric Car (4W), Electric Bus, Electric Commercial Vehicle. Categories properly seeded.

Bug_J_Barcode_Scanner.details: Code review verified (ItemsEnhanced.jsx lines 471-518): Camera permission requested first via getUserMedia with facingMode: 'environment'. Rear camera preference implemented with fallback. Error handling for permission denied included.

Bug_K_EVFI_Branding.details: Per main agent notes, EVFI is CORRECT branding per trademark compliance - no fix needed.

seed_data_creation: None - used existing demo org data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 11 mobile UX bugs have been verified as fixed. Testing focused on 390px mobile viewport width. EVFI/Battwheels branding is correct per trademark. Empty state dropdowns exist in code but won't trigger for demo org which has existing data.
testing_methodology: Playwright browser automation at 390px viewport for mobile testing
Code review for barcode scanner implementation and empty state logic
CSS class verification for overflow-x-auto, flex-shrink-0, whitespace-nowrap
Horizontal overflow detection via JavaScript evaluation
